name: Prawn Salad with Basil and Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Large prawns, shells and tails removed
2 Roasted sweet red bell peppers, seeded and thinly sliced (about 3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup of the olive oil with the garlic, coriander seeds, and 1 cup of the minced basil in a medium-size, non-reactive bowl. Add the prawns, cover, and marinate at room temperature for 1 hour or refrigerate overnight.
2. To grill the prawns: Prepare a medium-hot fire (a light layer of gray ash should cover the charcoal). Place the prawns on the grill and cook, basting with the marinade and rotating to cook evenly, for 4-5 minutes or until opaque through the center.
3. Remove from the grill.
4. To bake the prawns: Place the prawns in a single layer, with marinade, in a baking dish in a preheated oven at 450°F. Cook for 5-7 minutes or until the prawns are opaque through the center. Remove prawns from the baking pan with a slotted spoon.
5. Arrange the arugula and remaining basil on a large platter. Top with the warm prawns, roasted peppers, and feta cheese. Drizzle with the remaining 1/4 cup olive oil and sprinkle with freshly ground pepper.
